chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1161 0f 2017 Date Order with signature Of JLLBe For OrUers ٥n offlcg objections For hgaring of main case 21.11.2023 Mr Khan Muhammad | Sangi Advocate for the Petitioner Mr, Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondents University Mr, Ali Raza Balouch AAG ٠٦+٦ ٠ ٠٣ + + ٣ ٣وو٠+ Learned Counsel for the Petitioner contends that petitioner was initially appointed as Assistant to Driver |BPS-04| on daily wages in Shah Abdul Latif University who was subsequently regularized Later o٨, he was promoted as Starter in Transportation Department, Shah Abdul Latif University, In His case is that Respondent No 4, who is junior to him, has been promoted to grade 11 as Starter l However learned Counsel for the Respondents University submits that Respondent No 4 is senior to him but in any case ppea is pending with Respondent No2, which will be decided within period of one month Counsel fo٢ the Petitioner satisfied a٨٥ this petition accordingly disposed of in the above terms 8ra٥٤-
